test.template:
Run the test suite:
!`npm test 2>/dev/null || echo 'No test script found'`

Analyze results and suggest improvements for failing tests.

lint.template:
Run the linter:
!`npm run lint 2>/dev/null || npx eslint . 2>/dev/null || echo 'No linter found'`

Fix all auto-fixable issues and suggest manual fixes for the rest.

build.template:
Build the project:
!`npm run build 2>/dev/null || echo 'No build script found'`

Fix any build errors and optimize the output.

review.template:
Review the current code for:
- TypeScript type safety
- React/component best practices (if applicable)
- Security (XSS, injection)
- Performance (re-renders, bundle size)
- Testing coverage

Suggest specific improvements.
